SAKURAMOD-WIND.title: Wind
SAKURAMOD-WIND.description: A Windy element card. While Windy state is active, every 2 Windy cards draw 1 card. When played with Magic Charge, enter Windy state.
SAKURAMOD-WATER.title: Water
SAKURAMOD-WATER.description: A Watery element card. While Watery state is active, every 2 Watery cards grant 1 Energy. When played with Magic Charge, enter Watery state.
SAKURAMOD-FIRE.title: Fire
SAKURAMOD-FIRE.description: A Firey element card. While Firey state is active, Firey cards deal 3 damage to ALL enemies. When played with Magic Charge, enter Firey state.
SAKURAMOD-EARTH.title: Earth
SAKURAMOD-EARTH.description: An Earthy element card. While Earthy state is active, Earthy cards grant 4 Block. When played with Magic Charge, enter Earthy state.
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
SAKURAMOD-STABILIZE.description: Remove [red]Forgotten[/red] from 1 card in your hand or discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
SAKURAMOD-MANIFEST.description: Choose 1 of the revealed random Transparent Cards and add a copy to your hand. It gains [red]Forgotten[/red].
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CARD.title: Sakura Card
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_CARD.description: Converted from a Clow Card. When played, shuffle 1 Void into your draw pile.
SAKURAMOD-ECHO.title: Echo
SAKURAMOD-ECHO.description: When exhausted by The Song, trigger The Song's effect additional times.
SAKURAMOD-INVISIBLE.title: Invisible
SAKURAMOD-REMOVABLE.title: Removable
SAKURAMOD-REMOVABLE.description: After use, it will be removed from the master deck. And the temporary card does not work.
SAKURAMOD-COST_DECREASING.title: Cost-Decreasing
SAKURAMOD-COST_DECREASING.description: At the start of each battle, the cost is reduced by 1.
SAKURAMOD-ENTITY_LIMITED.title: Entity-Limited
SAKURAMOD-ENTITY_LIMITED.description: This card can only be effective when it comes from the combat bonus. The temporary one gained during the battle will not have an effect.
SAKURAMOD-PURGE.title: Purge
SAKURAMOD-PURGE.description: After use, permanently remove this card from combat and from your deck.
SAKURAMOD-LONER.title: Loner
SAKURAMOD-LONER.description: For each missing copy of this card in your deck, its value increases by 20%.
SAKURAMOD-FROSTBITE.title: Frostbite
SAKURAMOD-FROSTBITE.description: Each stack increases attack damage this enemy takes by 10%. At 6 stacks, remove all Frostbite and apply [gold]Freeze[/gold]. Frostbite loses 1 stack at the end of the enemy's turn.
